message:
test(notion): add unit tests for search result PII redaction

Add 4 unit tests (u56.4) covering the redact_search_result() function:
- email stripping from people properties
- created_by/last_edited_by email redaction
- preservation of non-PII fields (id, url, title)
- graceful handling when no person data is present

These tests verify the privacy-preserving behavior of Notion search
results before they leave the connector boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
